name: unifi
description: UniFi network management via MCP — official, internal, and hybrid UniFi Network actions through the rustifi MCP server.

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: Base URL the MCP client connects to. Keep the default http://localhost:7474 if running locally, or set to the remote server address (e.g. http://unifi-mcp.lan:7474). Must include the scheme and port; do NOT include a trailing /mcp path.

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication, sent as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32` or `just gen-token`. Must match UNIFI_MCP_TOKEN on the server side.

no_auth.title: Disable service auth
no_auth.description: Run the MCP server without auth. Only safe when binding to loopback (127.x). Use an upstream gateway otherwise.

auth_mode.title: Auth mode
auth_mode.description: Server auth mode. bearer keeps the static API token only. oauth enables Google OAuth/JWT for additional clients while the API token remains accepted for this Claude Code session. OAuth requires public_url, google_client_id, google_client_secret, and auth_admin_email.

public_url.title: Public URL
public_url.description: Public base URL for OAuth issuer/resource metadata, e.g. https://unifi-mcp.example.com. Required when auth_mode=oauth.

google_client_id.title: Google OAuth client ID
google_client_id.description: Google OAuth client ID used when auth_mode=oauth. Create a Web application OAuth client in Google Cloud Console.

google_client_secret.title: Google OAuth client secret
google_client_secret.description: Google OAuth client secret used when auth_mode=oauth. Stored in the generated plugin env file with mode 600.

auth_admin_email.title: OAuth admin email
auth_admin_email.description: Bootstrap allowed Google account for OAuth mode. The server refuses to start OAuth without an allowlisted account.

use_docker.title: Deploy with Docker
use_docker.description: True: run via the bundled docker compose stack (containerized, easier to upgrade, exposes port 7474, mounts /data volume). False: run the bundled binary directly — you are responsible for starting and managing it.

unifi_url.title: UniFi controller URL
unifi_url.description: Base URL of your UniFi controller, e.g. https://192.168.1.1 or https://unifi.local. Required — the server will fail to start without this.

unifi_api_key.title: UniFi API key
unifi_api_key.description: X-API-KEY value for UniFi controller authentication. Generate in: UniFi OS → Settings → Admins & Users → API Keys. Required.

unifi_site.title: UniFi site
unifi_site.description: UniFi site name. Defaults to 'default'. Change only if you have multiple sites configured in your controller.

unifi_skip_tls.title: Skip TLS verification
unifi_skip_tls.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for the UniFi controller. Almost always required since UniFi uses self-signed certificates by default.

unifi_legacy.title: Legacy controller mode
unifi_legacy.description: Disable the /proxy/network path prefix. Set true for older non-UDM controllers running on port 8443.
